creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222475
upstream patch

This is a patch importing [1] from upstream to the port. It replaces my previous patch which added back the ungrab_all call.

I'm running with it and everything looks fine.

It would be really useful if someone who was experiencing this issue could test running this patch and confirms it really fixes the issue.


[1] https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/libxfce4ui/-/merge_requests/27
